session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Just run the command and report what happens - do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target and report results

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 Building erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Built erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Installed 58 packages in 355ms [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1669 files already formatted

... [111 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
make fast-ci failed: Prettier formatting issues found
The command completed with exit code 2 (failure). Here's the summary:
**Failed Checks:** - Prettier check: Code style issues found in 2 files - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Passed Checks:** - Lint: All checks passed - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Format check (ruff): 1669 files already formatted - Markdown check: Passed - Exec reference check: Up to date - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing: All properly paired (19 CLAUDE.md files, 0 violations) - Unit tests (erk): 5933 passed in 22.55s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.38s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.82s - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed (output cut off)
**Root Cause:** The Prettier formatter found code style issues in 2 markdown files. These need to be formatted with Prettier to pass the fast-ci check.
